title: Spectrum Systems Work Item
description: Canonical work item produced by the review-to-work automation (Prompt K). Converts governance reviews, evaluation outputs, and observability findings into structured, prioritized, and trackable work items.

work_item_id.description: Stable deterministic identifier for the work item (e.g. WI-0001).

source_type.description: Origin category that produced this work item.

source_id.description: Review ID, evaluation run ID, or observability scan ID from which this item originates.

repo.description: Repository that owns or should act on this work item (owner/name or short name).

finding_id.description: Original finding identifier from the source artifact (e.g. F-1, RC-1, A-3). Preserved for traceability.

title.description: Short, descriptive title for the work item.

description.description: Full description of the finding, context, and expected resolution.

severity.description: Impact severity of the work item.

category.description: Functional category for routing and filtering.

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the work item.

priority_score.description: Numeric priority score (1=lowest, 100=highest). Derived from severity and blocking status.

blocking.description: True when this item blocks downstream work or CI gates.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date this work item was created (YYYY-MM-DD).

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 date this work item was last updated (YYYY-MM-DD).

related_artifacts.description: Relative paths or references to related files, schemas, or artifacts.

suggested_issue_title.description: Draft GitHub issue title for human filing.

carried_forward_from.description: Source review ID if this finding is carried forward from a prior review.

resolution_note.description: Free-text note explaining why the item was resolved or deferred.
